This post is a cleanup of my notes on motors from this time. What I propose here is a derivation of the performance of a brushless direct current (BLDC) motor from its geometry."}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["BLDC motors are based on a simple idea, but their analysis is quite interesting and I really enjoyed working on it and I hope you will enjoy reading it as much.
